# Bundle Builder

> An interactive bundle builder for a home security system. Customers can
> pick cameras, plans, sensors, and accessories, configure quantities and
> variants, and review the bundle total before checkout.

## What this site does

- Lets visitors assemble a custom home-security bundle from four categories:
  cameras, plans, sensors, and accessories.
- Persists the in-progress bundle in `localStorage` so it survives reloads.
- Computes discounted pricing and bundle savings client-side.
- Hands the assembled bundle to a checkout step that prints the payload
  that would be sent to a checkout API.

## Pages

- [/](https://ecom-experts-chi.vercel.app/): Single-page bundle builder.

## Notes

- This is a single-page React application; all interaction happens on `/`.
- The site is purely client-side; there is no public API to query.
